items.statcast_observation: Carter Jensen produced the hardest tracked Royals contact: 106.7 mph at a 37.0 degree launch angle.
items.summary: The Royals beat the San Francisco Giants, KC 3, SF 2. Luinder Avila led the night, working 6.1 innings with 2 earned runs, 7 strikeouts and 1 walk. Carter Jensen supplied the loudest Royals contact at 106.7 mph.
items.title: Royals vs Giants Recap
